scripts.dev: sh -c 'pnpm -s build && while [ "$1" = "--" ]; do shift; done && node packages/cli/dist/index.js "$@"' --
scripts.mdl: sh -c 'pnpm -s build && while [ "$1" = "--" ]; do shift; done && node packages/cli/dist/index.js "$@"' --
scripts.publish: pnpm run publish:core && pnpm run publish:sdk && pnpm run publish:cli
